description_long: This urban lounge area features a partially covered octagonal seating arrangement with a central fire pit, surrounded by a low, solid wall. The structure includes a slatted roof supported by posts, providing shade over a section with two lounge chairs and a small round table. The flooring is paved with interlocking tiles, and the perimeter is enclosed by a decorative fence with stone pillars and metalwork. The seating area is built-in, with angular concrete or stone benches forming a semi-circle around the fire pit. The overall design is robust and intended for communal relaxation in outdoor urban environments such as parks or plazas.
description: A partially covered urban lounge with built-in octagonal seating, central fire pit, and decorative fencing, designed for outdoor communal use.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the lounge from an angled perspective, highlighting the covered area with lounge chairs, the fire pit, and the surrounding fence.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side elevation, emphasizing the height of the fence, the roof structure, and the arrangement of the seating area inside.
description_view_2: View 2 is a top-down view, focusing on the slatted roof and the overall footprint of the lounge, with the seating and fire pit partially visible.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a clear look at the open seating area, the fire pit, and the relationship between the covered and uncovered sections.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two loose, medium-sized cushions placed on lounge chairs under the covered section; no cushions on the built-in benches.
attribute_backrest_design: Built-in benches have low, straight backrests integrated into the wall; lounge chairs feature slightly reclined, mid-height backrests.
attribute_armrest_presence: Lounge chairs have low, straight armrests; built-in benches lack armrests.
attribute_leg_style: Lounge chairs have short, straight metal legs; benches are built-in with no visible legs.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Lounge chair cushions have a solid, smooth fabric surface with no visible pattern; benches are unupholstered.
